feed.title: Chirpy
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Test
entry.summary: Test tests tsaet <table><tr> result: <table><tr> Post converted from Medium by ZMediumToMarkdown.

entry.title: ZhgChgLi / ZMediumToMarkdown
entry.summary: ZhgChgLi / ZMediumToMarkdown ZMediumToMarkdown is a powerful tool that allows you to effortlessly download and convert your Medium posts to Markdown format. ZMediumToMarkdown is a powerful tool that allows you to effortlessly download and convert your Medium posts to Markdown format. This project can help you create an auto-sync or auto-backup service from Medium, such as automatically syn...

entry.title: About
entry.summary: About Thank you for using ZMediumToJekyll, this tool is powered by ZMediumToMarkdown, that is also create by ZhgChgLi. This tool can help you sync your Medium posts with your own Jekyll blog. It will automatically download your posts from Medium, convert them to Markdown, and upload them to your repository. If you find this tool helpful, please consider to buy me a coffee.❤️ Build by Jekyll...
